bird.name: Socorro wren
bird.summary: The Socorro wren (Troglodytes sissonii) is a species of bird in the family Troglodytidae. It is endemic to Socorro Island, Mexico.

relations.subject: Socorro wren
relations.evidence: |name-list-style=amp |year=1956|title= The Birds of the Revilla Gigedo Islands, Mexico|journal=The Condor|volume=58|issue=2|pages= 107–120|doi=10.2307/1364977|jstor=1364977 |url=http://sora.unm.edu/sites/default/files/journals/condor/v058n02/p0107-p0120.pdf}} The main limiting factors are by habitat destruction due to feral sheep and predation by feral cats
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
